items.title_en: I'm Tired of Talking to AI
items.title_zh: 我厌倦和 AI 交谈
items.summary_en: The piece captures fatigue with AI-generated answers and a longing for more trustworthy, human-like interaction. It calls for clearer sources, transparent reasoning, and design choices that favor meaningful dialogue over generic polish.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章表达了对 AI 生成回答的疲惫，渴望更可信、可核验的互动。作者呼吁提供来源、提高推理透明度，并在设计上优先实现有意义的对话，而非泛泛的回答。

items.title_en: Last.fm is now independent
items.title_zh: Last.fm 现在独立运营
items.summary_en: Last.fm has achieved independence from its former owner, enabling autonomous product decisions and potentially different privacy posture. The move matters for long-time users and the sustainability of the platform in a competitive music landscape. It signals a wish to recalibrate how the service fits into modern open ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: Last.fm 已实现独立运营，能自行决策产品路线并可能调整隐私策略。在竞争激烈的音乐生态中，这一举措关系到长期用户的体验与平台的可持续性。也显示出在现代开源生态中重新定位服务定位的愿望。

items.title_en: DuckDuckGo search saw 28% more visits after Google said people love AI mode
items.title_zh: DuckDuckGo 搜索在 Google 宣称人们喜爱 AI 模式后访量上涨 28%
items.summary_en: DuckDuckGo saw roughly 28% more visits in the week after Google publicly touted AI mode, signaling interest in AI-enabled search options beyond the big players. The shift hints at how privacy-focused users respond to mainstream AI features and where alternative search engines fit in.
items.summary_zh: 在 Google 公布 AI 模式受欢迎的一周内，DuckDuckGo 的访问量增加了约 28%，显示 AI 功能对隐私导向用户的吸引力。此现象揭示隐私取向的用户在主流 AI 功能出现时如何寻找替代方案，以及替代搜索引擎的定位。

items.title_en: PostHog will train AI models with your data (opted-in by default)
items.title_zh: PostHog 将默认同意地用你的数据训练 AI 模型
items.summary_en: PostHog plans to train AI models on user data by default, with opt-out available. The move highlights the privacy-performance tradeoff in AI tooling and the friction users face when consent is implicit. For developers, it signals where data use practices are headed in open-source analytics.
items.summary_zh: PostHog 将默认使用用户数据训练 AI 模型，用户仍可选择退出。这一设计凸显了 AI 工具中的隐私与性能权衡，以及在开源分析产品中透明的数据治理之必要性。对于开发者而言，也提示了数据使用准则将成为未来的关注点。

items.title_en: Tech CEOs are apparently suffering from AI psychosis
items.title_zh: 科技CEO 似乎在 AI 热潮中陷入‘AI 精神错乱’
items.summary_en: Tech CEOs are reportedly suffering from AI psychosis, a tongue-in-cheek description of how leaders react to AI hype. The piece argues that rapid shifts in AI narratives are reshaping strategy, hiring, and governance, sometimes more than actual product outcomes. This dynamic matters for investors and engineers plotting long-term roadmaps.
items.summary_zh: 科技界 CEO 被称在 AI 热潮中经历“AI 精神错乱”，用以描述领导者对 AI 热度的快速反应。文章认为 AI 叙事的迅速变化正在重塑战略、招聘与治理，有时影响力甚至超过实际产品成果。这一动态对投资者和工程师制定长期路线图至关重要。

items.title_en: Private Equity Bought America's Essential Services
items.title_zh: 私募股权买下美国的基础公共服务
items.summary_en: The piece argues that private equity has increasingly acquired essential public-facing services, raising concerns about debt loads, cost-cutting, and long-term resilience. It highlights potential risks to affordability and access while outlining the incentives at play in capital-heavy sectors.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出私募股权日益收购关键公共服务，带来债务压力、成本削减和长期韧性方面的担忧，可能影响可负担性与可及性，同时揭示资本密集型行业中的激励机制。

items.title_en: Italy region: +200% tax on datacenters built in green/agricultural areas
items.title_zh: Italy region: +200% tax on datacenters built in green/agricultural areas
items.summary_en: A regional policy in Italy imposes up to a 200% tax on data centers built in green or agricultural zones, influencing where infrastructure investments occur and raising questions about climate and land-use trade-offs. The move highlights how policy can shape data infrastructure localization and costs. Companies planning in Europe should monitor regional incentives and constraints.
items.summary_zh: 意大利某区域对在绿色或农业区域建造的数据中心征收高达 200% 的税，影响基础设施投资的地理分布，并引发关于气候与土地使用权衡的问题。这一举措凸显政策如何影响数据基础设施的本地化与成本，企业在欧盟地区的投资需要关注区域激励与限制。

items.title_en: Incident with Pull Requests, Issues, Git Operations and API Requests
items.title_zh: 关于拉取请求、问题、Git 操作及 API 请求的故障事件
items.summary_en: An incident disrupted pull requests, issues, Git operations, and API requests, affecting collaboration and automation workflows. The incident underscores the importance of platform reliability and clear incident communication.
items.summary_zh: 一次故障中断了拉取请求、问题追踪、Git 操作和 API 请求，影响协作与自动化工作流。事件凸显平台可靠性与清晰事件沟通的重要性。

items.title_en: Mini Micro Fantasy Computer
items.title_zh: 迷你微型幻想计算机
items.summary_en: Mini Micro Fantasy Computer showcases a tiny, approachable computer design that still supports expressive programming and exploration of architecture concepts. It serves as a playful, educational platform for hobbyists.
items.summary_zh: 迷你微型幻想计算机展示了一个极小巧却富于表达的计算机设计，便于学习架构概念并进行程序探索，面向爱好者的教育性平台。

items.title_en: All of human cooking compressed into 2 megabytes
items.title_zh: 把人类烹饪知识压缩到 2MB
items.summary_en: A study presents a compact representation of cooking knowledge compressed into about 2 megabytes, enabling recipe generation with minimal data. The result probes the limits of knowledge compression and what it implies for domain-specific modeling.
items.summary_zh: 一项研究提出把烹饪知识压缩至约 2MB 的紧凑表征，仍能生成多样化的食谱。结果探讨了知识压缩的极限及其对领域特定模型的含义。

items.title_en: Declassified CIA Cartography Maps from the 1980s
items.title_zh: 1980 年代解密的 CIA 制图地图
items.summary_en: Declassified CIA maps from the 1980s reveal Cold War geospatial intelligence and mapmaking practices, illustrating how visual data supported policy and military planning. The release offers a historical lens on data visualization, cartography trends, and information security practices of the era.
items.summary_zh: 解密的 1980 年代 CIA 制图地图揭示了冷战时期的地理情报与制图实践，显示可视化数据如何为政策与军事规划提供支持。这一公开资料为数据可视化、制图趋势与当时的信息安全实践提供了历史视角。

items.title_en: The VibeSec Reckoning
items.title_zh: VibeSec 的清算：关于情感驱动的安全文化的反思
items.summary_en: Martin Fowler’s VibeSec Reckoning critiques security discourse that leans on vibes and culture, urging more concrete risk-based practices. It pushes for measurable outcomes, better engineering discipline, and transparent security metrics. The piece challenges teams to move beyond mood-driven narratives.
items.summary_zh: Martin Fowler 的 VibeSec 清算批评了过于依赖情感与文化的安全话语，呼吁采用更明确的风险导向做法。它推动可衡量结果、更加严格的工程纪律与透明的安全指标。该文促使团队超越情绪驱动的叙事走向实质性安全实践。

items.title_en: Spain blocks prediction markets Polymarket, Kalshi over lack of gambling licence
items.title_zh: 西班牙因缺乏赌博许可而封锁 Polymarket 与 Kalshi 预测市场
items.summary_en: Spain blocks Polymarket and Kalshi prediction markets for lacking gambling licenses, signaling tighter European regulation for consumer-facing betting-style platforms. The move could constrain innovative fintech startups operating in Spain and set a precedent for licensing requirements.
items.summary_zh: 西班牙因缺乏赌博许可，阻止 Polymarket 与 Kalshi 等预测市场运营，显示欧洲对面向消费者的预测交易平台的监管趋严。此举可能限制在西班牙运营的创新金融科技公司，并为许可制度设立新基准。

items.title_en: Claude Code as a Daily Driver: Claude.md, Skills, Subagents, Plugins, and MCPs
items.title_zh: 把 Claude Code 作为日常开发驱动：Claude.md、技能、子代理、插件与 MCP
items.summary_en: Demonstrates using Claude Code as a daily coding assistant, detailing practical setup with Claude.md, skills, subagents, plugins, and MCPs to boost productivity and automation in software development.
items.summary_zh: 展示将 Claude Code 作为日常开发助手的用法，涵盖 Claude.md、技能、子代理、插件与 MCP 的实用设置，提升开发生产力与自动化能力。

items.title_en: Show HN: I made an emergency page for my family
items.title_zh: Show HN：我为家人做了一个紧急信息页
items.summary_en: A personal project creating an emergency page to share statuses and guidance with family during crises, demonstrating a lightweight resilience tool for real-world scenarios. It underscores how simple web apps can improve communication under stress. The approach may inspire similar family-safe, offline-capable designs.
items.summary_zh: 一个个人项目，为家人在危机时刻分享状态与指引而开发的紧急信息页，展示了一种用于现实情景的轻量级韧性工具。它强调简单的网页应用在压力情境下改善沟通的作用。此设计或可启发家人友好且离线可用的类似方案。

items.title_en: The worst job interview I ever had
items.title_zh: 我经历过的最糟糕的面试
items.summary_en: The narrator recounts a disastrously misaligned interview that left them frustrated and questioning the company’s process. The episode offers practical takeaways about screening for respect and preparedness, asking clarifying questions, and evaluating whether interviewers are set up to assess fit, not just test nerves.
items.summary_zh: 叙述者讲述了一次极为失配的面试经历，过程让人感到沮丧并对公司的招聘流程产生质疑。此事为读者提供了筛选面试质量的要点：看是否对方尊重、是否准备充分、是否愿意澄清问题，以及面试官是否真正想评估匹配度，而非单纯考验应试者。

items.title_en: Big tech's anti-labor playbook has come for Wikipedia
items.title_zh: 大型科技公司的反劳工手法也延伸至维基百科
items.summary_en: A critical piece argues that the anti-labor playbook favored by big tech has infiltrated Wikipedia, shaping editor dynamics, governance, and content moderation. The piece warns that corporate pressure and labor suppression tactics threaten Wikipedia’s open, collaborative model and could impact information quality and editor rights.
items.summary_zh: 文章批评大型科技公司用来压制劳工的手法已渗透到维基百科，影响编辑社区的治理与内容管理。警示称企业压力与压制劳动的策略可能侵蚀维基百科的开放协作模式，进而影响信息质量与编辑者权益。

items.title_en: Go: Support for Generic Methods
items.title_zh: Go：支持泛型方法
items.summary_en: Go adds support for generics and generic methods, enabling more reusable code and type-safe abstractions. This marks a major evolution for the language, improving ergonomics for library authors and API designers. Expect broader adoption in real-world projects as patterns become clearer.
items.summary_zh: Go 新增对泛型及泛型方法的支持，提升代码重用性与类型安全的抽象能力。这是语言发展中的一次重要演进，将提升库作者与 API 设计者的工作效率，随着使用模式逐步明朗，预计在实际项目中的应用将更广泛。

items.title_en: I think Anthropic and OpenAI have found product-market fit
items.title_zh: 我认为 Anthropic 与 OpenAI 已找到产品-市场契合点
items.summary_en: The author argues that Anthropic and OpenAI have achieved product-market fit, suggesting their APIs and tooling are resonating with developers and enterprises. The view reflects a maturing AI ecosystem where practical, scalable offerings begin to outpace novelty. It highlights what successful AI tooling needs to scale.
items.summary_zh: 作者认为 Anthropic 与 OpenAI 已找到产品-市场契合点，表明它们的 API 与工具已经得到开发者和企业的共鸣。这一观点反映出 AI 生态系统逐步成熟，实用、可扩展的产品开始超越新奇性。也点出成功的 AI 工具要能实现规模化的关键要素。

items.title_en: Cloudflare Flagship
items.title_zh: Cloudflare Flagship 平台
items.summary_en: Cloudflare flags Flagship as a platform for running experiments, feature flagging, and telemetry across Cloudflare products. It aims to streamline experimentation at scale with measurable outcomes and safer rollouts.
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 推出 Flagship 平台，用于对 Cloudflare 产品进行实验、功能开关及遥测分析。该平台旨在让开发者以可控、可量化的方式进行大规模试验并更安全地逐步上线新功能。

items.title_en: Evolving Webflow for the Agentic Web
items.title_zh: Evolving Webflow for the Agentic Web
items.summary_en: Webflow outlines updates to support an agentic web where autonomous agents perform tasks, addressing tooling, security, and interoperability questions. The plans reflect how front-end tooling is expanding to support AI-assisted workflows and multi-agent orchestration. It signals a future where browser-native capabilities enable more complex automation.
items.summary_zh: Webflow 介绍了为代理性网络升级的计划，即让自治代理执行任务，并处理工具、安全与互操作性等问题。该计划反映了前端工具链向 AI 辅助工作流和多代理编排扩展的趋势，预示浏览器原生能力将支持更复杂的自动化。

items.title_en: Stripe is friendly to “friendly fraud”
items.title_zh: Stripe 对所谓的“友好欺诈”态度更显宽容
items.summary_en: Stripe has earned a reputation for being forgiving toward 'friendly fraud' claims, which can let customers dispute charges even when services were delivered.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章讨论 Stripe 在所谓的“友好欺诈”情形上的宽容态度，以及对商家可能造成的风险与成本。作者分析了风险策略的权衡，以及对商家收入和信任生态的潜在影响。

items.title_en: XLIDE: VBA without excel
items.title_zh: XLIDE：无需 Excel 即可使用 VBA
items.summary_en: XLIDE lets you author and run VBA code outside Excel, offering a path to automate or port macros in alternative toolchains. It opens opportunities for teams with VBA-heavy workflows to reduce Excel licensing friction. The project signals a broader trend toward decoupling legacy automation from spreadsheets.
items.summary_zh: XLIDE 允许在不依赖 Excel 的情况下编写和运行 VBA 代码，为在替代工具链中自动化或迁移宏提供了新途径。它为大量使用 VBA 的团队减少了对 Excel 许可的依赖，体现了将遗留自动化与表格应用解耦的趋势。

items.title_en: That Methyl Methacrylate Tank
items.title_zh: 那個甲基丙烯酸甲酯罐
items.summary_en: Delves into a methyl methacrylate storage tank story, highlighting safety, material behavior, and lessons for industrial design. The piece links a single facility incident to broader concerns about risk management in chemical storage.
items.summary_zh: 讲述甲基丙烯酸甲酯储罐相关的故事，强调安全、材料行为和工业设计中的教训。文章把个别事件与化学储存中的风险管理问题联系起来，提出更广泛的安全实践。

items.title_en: Using AI to write better code more slowly
items.title_zh: 用 AI 慢下来写出更好的代码
items.summary_en: AI can help you write code, but slowing down can improve quality. The piece argues against rushing to rely on AI; instead implement deliberate review, stronger tests, and iterative refactoring. The key takeaway: use AI as a co-pilot, not a speed boost.
items.summary_zh: AI 可以协助写代码，但放慢节奏能提升质量。文章反对靠 AI 提速的做法，主张进行有意识的评审、加强测试和迭代重构。核心在于将 AI 视为合作者，而非提速工具。

items.title_en: Erin Brockovich made a map to track data centers around the country
items.title_zh: 艾琳·布罗克维奇绘制的数据中心分布地图
items.summary_en: Erin Brockovich creates a nationwide map to track data centers, highlighting energy use and environmental implications of the data economy. The map serves as a tool for journalists and policymakers to scrutinize infrastructure footprints.
items.summary_zh: 艾琳·布罗克维奇绘制了一张覆盖全美的数据中心分布地图，瞄准揭示能源消耗与数据经济的环境影响。地图成为记者与政策制定者审视基础设施足迹的工具。

items.title_en: Netherlands blocks US takeover of vital digital supplier
items.title_zh: 荷兰阻止美企收购关键数字供应商
items.summary_en: The Netherlands blocks a US takeover of a vital digital supplier on national security grounds, signaling Europe’s increased scrutiny of cross-border tech deals involving critical infrastructure. Regulators may demand concessions or divestitures, shaping future M&A in the digital sector.
items.summary_zh: 荷兰出于国家安全考虑阻止了一笔美方对关键数字供应商的收购，标志着欧洲加强对涉及关键基础设施的跨境科技交易的审查。监管机构或将要求让步或剥离，可能影响未来数字领域的并购动向。

items.title_en: Where does next-token prediction leave us?
items.title_zh: 下一令牌预测将带我们走向何方？
items.summary_en: As language models grow more capable, relying solely on next-token prediction may limit future AI progress. The piece argues that planning, grounding, and tool-use are missing from a token-predictor paradigm, implying a shift toward hybrid architectures could shape the next wave of AI.
items.summary_zh: 随着语言模型能力提升，单靠预测下一个令牌是否足以实现通用智能成为争论焦点。文章指出仅靠下一词预测可能遗漏计划、环境理解和目标对齐等关键能力，未来的AI发展需要引入显式规划或工具使用等机制。

items.title_en: The real cost of owning a home
items.title_zh: 拥有房产的真实成本
items.summary_en: Owning a home entails more than mortgage payments; taxes, maintenance, insurance, and opportunity costs all factor in. The analysis breaks down these hidden costs and shows how they vary across markets, helping readers gauge the true affordability and mobility implications for tech workers.
items.summary_zh: 购房成本不仅仅是按揭，还包括税费、维护、保险以及机会成本等因素。文章分解了这些隐性成本，并展示了在不同市场的差异，帮助科技工作者评估真实负担与流动性影响。

items.title_en: An Update on Composer and Packagist Supply Chain Security
items.title_zh: An Update on Composer and Packagist Supply Chain Security
items.summary_en: Security guidance for PHP’s Composer and Packagist supply chain, covering best practices like package pinning, integrity checks, and monitoring for tampering. The note signals ongoing pressure to harden dependency management as ecosystems grow more interconnected. Developers should prioritize verification and provenance in their pipelines.
items.summary_zh: 关于 PHP 的 Composer 与 Packagist 供应链安全的更新，涵盖打包固定、完整性校验和监控篡改等最佳实践。此类提醒凸显在生态系统日益互联的背景下对依赖管理加强保护的重要性。开发者应把验证与来源追溯纳入管线重点。

items.title_en: Dropbox CEO Drew Houston to step down
items.title_zh: Dropbox 的首席执行官 Drew Houston 将卸任
items.summary_en: Dropbox confirms leadership transition as founder and CEO Drew Houston steps down; the move signals potential strategic pivots around collaboration features, AI-enabled products, and enterprise offerings. The incoming leadership will shape the company's direction in a competitive cloud and productivity market.
items.summary_zh: Dropbox 宣布领导层变动，创始人兼首席执行官 Drew Houston 将卸任，这可能推动在协作功能、AI 化产品及企业级服务方面的战略调整。新任领导团队将决定公司在竞争激烈的云存储与生产力市场中的走向。

items.title_en: The Melancholy of Slaying Monsters
items.title_zh: 屠怪之忧郁
items.summary_en: Explores the emotional texture of monster-slaying narratives and why victory can feel melancholic rather than purely triumphant. It argues that the act of defeating monsters often leaves players with a sense of responsibility, fatigue, or moral ambiguity, shaping how designers tell stories and design systems.
items.summary_zh: 探索怪物屠杀叙事背后的情感纹理，阐释为何胜利有时会带来哀愁而非纯粹的胜利感。作者认为击败怪物的过程常伴随责任感、疲惫感或道德模糊，这也影响设计者如何讲述故事与构建系统。

items.title_en: Show HN: Open-source Workspace (mail,docs,spreadsheet,drive) web/iOS
items.title_zh: Show HN：开源的工作区（邮箱、文档、表格、云盘）Web/iOS
items.summary_en: An open-source, self-hosted workspace bundle provides mail, docs, spreadsheets, and drive access on Web and iOS, offering a privacy-respecting alternative to SaaS. The project demonstrates maturity in open productivity stacks and the appeal of local control. It invites consideration of deployment, maintenance, and ecosystem compatibility.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：一个开源、可自托管的工作区，涵盖邮箱、文档、表格和云盘，提供 Web 和 iOS 端访问，作为对传统 SaaS 的隐私友好替代方案。该项目展示了开源生产力栈的成熟度以及对本地控制的吸引力。它引发了对部署、维护和生态兼容性的思考。

items.title_en: Atomically precise mechanosynthesis of carbon structures on hydrogenated Silicon
items.title_zh: 在氢化硅上进行原子级精确的碳结构机械合成
items.summary_en: A study demonstrates atomically precise mechanosynthesis of carbon nanostructures on hydrogenated silicon, hinting at integration opportunities between carbon nanomaterials and silicon electronics. This advances nanoscale fabrication concepts with potential device-level implications. The result pushes toward new materials-for-logic directions.
items.summary_zh: 一项研究展示了在氢化硅表面进行原子级精确的碳结构机械合成，为碳基纳米材料与硅电子学的集成打开了新机会。这推动了纳米级制造的概念，未来可能对器件级应用产生影响。

items.title_en: Taking a walk may lead to more creativity than sitting, study finds (2014)
items.title_zh: 散步比久坐更能激发创造力（2014 年研究）
items.summary_en: Walking boosts creativity more than sitting, according to a 2014 study. It suggests teams should embrace walk meetings and brainstorming on the move to unlock higher creativity.
items.summary_zh: 2014 年的研究显示散步比久坐更能激发创造力。建议团队采用步行会议、边走边脑 brainstorm 的做法，以提升集体创造力。

items.title_en: Outsourcing plus local AI will soon become more economical vs. frontier labs
items.title_zh: 外包+本地 AI 将很快比 Frontier Labs 更具成本效益
items.summary_en: The piece argues that combining outsourcing inference with local AI runtimes will reduce costs relative to more centralized frontier-labs stacks, driven by commodity hardware and open models. It discusses the economic shift toward on-prem or edge inference and the implications for AI vendors.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为，将外包推理与本地 AI 运行时结合，将在成本上优于“Frontier Labs”一类的集中化方案，得益于通用硬件和开源模型。这意味着向本地化、边缘推理的经济模型转变，将改变 AI 供应商的定价与商业模式。

items.title_en: Sonny Rollins, jazz saxophonist, has died
items.title_zh: 桑尼·罗林斯爵士去世
items.summary_en: Jazz legend Sonny Rollins has died, marking the end of an era in improvisational saxophone. The obituary reflects on his influence, innovations, and enduring sound that shaped modern jazz.
items.summary_zh: 爵士萨克斯传奇人物桑尼·罗林斯去世，标志着即兴演奏传统的一代谢落。纪念文章回顾了他在音色、即兴与乐队领导方面的影响力。

items.title_en: Show HN: Posthorn, self-hosted mail gateway
items.title_zh: Show HN：Posthorn，自托管邮件网关
items.summary_en: Posthorn is a self-hosted mail gateway project aimed at simplifying mail routing, spam filtering, and self-hosted email infrastructure. It demonstrates the appeal of self-managed email flows amidst ongoing concerns about privacy and data residency. The project invites evaluation for teams seeking control and configurability.
items.summary_zh: Posthorn 是一个自托管邮件网关项目，目标是简化邮件路由、垃圾邮件过滤以及自托管的邮件基础设施。它体现了在隐私与数据驻留持续受关切的背景下，对自管邮件流的吸引力。该项目适合寻求控制权与可配置性的团队进行评估。

items.title_en: OpenAI and Anthropic dig in against each other on AI jobs apocalypse
items.title_zh: OpenAI 与 Anthropic 针锋相对：AI 就业市场末日论
items.summary_en: OpenAI and Anthropic clash over AI job apocalypse, each presenting competing narratives about automation risk and the future of work. The debate highlights how industry rhetoric can shape policy, hiring, and startup incentives. Readers should consider how these perspectives align with actual market data.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 与 Anthropic 就 AI 就业市场的末日论展开了激烈辩论，各自提出对自动化风险与未来工作形态的对立叙事。此类辩论凸显了行业言论如何影响政策、招聘与初创企业激励。读者应结合实际市场数据来判断哪些观点更具可行性。

items.title_en: A few interesting modern pixel fonts
items.title_zh: 几种有趣的现代像素字体
items.summary_en: Modern pixel fonts push legibility and personality at small sizes, ideal for retro-inspired UI and indie games. A handful of current designs balance crisp bitmap aesthetics with thoughtful metrics and hinting. The post showcases how typography adapts to low-resolution contexts in modern development.
items.summary_zh: 现代像素字体在小尺寸下强调可读性与个性，非常适合复古风格的界面与独立游戏。文中精选的几款设计兼顾清晰的像素美感与合理的字距、字号与点阵设计。该话题体现了在低分辨率场景中，字体设计如何与现代开发需求并行进化。

items.title_en: The user is visibly frustrated
items.title_zh: 用户情绪明显的挫败感
items.summary_en: Visible user frustration signals UX flaws and cognitive load. Responding with clearer feedback, resilient interfaces, and better error handling can reduce churn.
items.summary_zh: 用户情绪明显的挫败感往往暴露了 UX 缺陷与认知负担。通过提供更清晰的反馈、健壮的界面和更好的错误处理，能降低用户流失。文中强调在真实应用中应关注的实用模式。

items.title_en: TSDuck: Open-source toolkit for MPEG-TS analysis and manipulation
items.title_zh: TSDuck：用于 MPEG-TS 分析与处理的开源工具包
items.summary_en: Introduces TSDuck, an open-source toolkit for analyzing and manipulating MPEG-TS streams, useful for broadcasters, streaming services, and automated testing workflows.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 TSDuck，这是一个用于分析和处理 MPEG-TS 流的开源工具包，适用于广播、流媒体和自动化测试工作流。

items.title_en: Show HN: Filemat – an open-source web-based file manager
items.title_zh: Show HN：Filemat – 一个开源的基于 Web 的文件管理器
items.summary_en: Filemat is an open-source web-based file manager; it offers a lightweight, self-hosted option for managing files via the browser. It illustrates the growing interest in browser-first file management tools and self-hosted alternatives to cloud services. The project invites evaluation for small teams seeking simplicity and control.
items.summary_zh: Filemat 是一个开源的基于 Web 的文件管理器，提供浏览器端的轻量级自托管选项来管理文件。它体现了对浏览器优先的文件管理工具以及自托管替代云服务的兴趣增长。该项目适合寻求简单性与控制的小团队进行评估。

items.title_en: What color is your function? (2015)
items.title_zh: 你的函数是什么颜色？（2015）
items.summary_en: A reflective look at how developers think about functions, using color as a metaphor to discuss naming and behavior.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章以颜色隐喻来探讨开发者对函数命名与行为的理解。

items.title_en: Tunecat: Simple Internet Radio
items.title_zh: Tunecat：简易互联网广播
items.summary_en: Tunecat offers a lightweight, open-source internet radio solution focused on simplicity and reliability. It targets easy streaming and local network compatibility, appealing to hobbyists who want a clean, offline-friendly radio appliance.
items.summary_zh: Tunecat 提供一个简洁、开源的网络电台方案，强调易用性和稳定的流媒体体验，适合爱好者搭建个人广播设备。它面向跨设备播放和本地网络场景，追求低资源占用与简单配置。

items.title_en: The Ballad of TIGIT
items.title_zh: TIGIT之歌
items.summary_en: TIGIT is a checkpoint receptor in cancer immunotherapy. The piece traces its development, clinical promise, and the challenges of turning checkpoint biology into reliable treatments.
items.summary_zh: TIGIT 是肿瘤免疫治疗中的一种免疫检查点受体。文章梳理了其发展、潜在临床价值以及将相关生物学转化为可靠治疗方案的挑战。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Minicor (YC P26) – Windows desktop automations at scale
items.title_zh: Launch HN：Minicor（YC P26）—大规模的 Windows 桌面自动化
items.summary_en: Minicor, a YC-backed startup, offers scalable Windows desktop automation for enterprises, enabling scripted workflows across large fleets. The launch post highlights how their tooling addresses traditional RPA pain points like reliability, governance, and scale.
items.summary_zh: YC 资本支持的 Minicor 提供面向企业的 Windows 桌面自动化，支持在大规模设备上执行可重复的工作流。其产品定位旨在解决传统机器人流程自动化在可靠性、治理和可扩展性方面的痛点。

items.title_en: Nvidia Vera CPU Benchmarks: Olympus Cores Delivering Great Performance
items.title_zh: 英伟达 Vera CPU 基准测试：Olympus 内核带来卓越性能
items.summary_en: Reviews Nvidia Vera CPU benchmarks, noting Olympus cores delivering strong performance in key workloads and discussing implications for future server and AI workloads.
items.summary_zh: 评测英伟达 Vera CPU 基准测试，指出 Olympus 内核在关键工作负载上表现出色，并讨论对未来服务器和 AI 工作负载的潜在影响。

items.title_en: Unicode 18.0.0 Beta
items.title_zh: Unicode 18.0.0 测试版
items.summary_en: Outlines the Unicode 18.0.0 beta features, including new characters and emoji updates, and discusses implications for font design, text processing, and internationalization.
items.summary_zh: 概述 Unicode 18.0.0 测试版的新字符与表情更新，以及对字体设计、文本处理和国际化的软件影响。

items.title_en: A portentous reunion
items.title_zh: 一次具有里程碑意义的重聚
items.summary_en: A Portentous Reunion marks a milestone gathering of key technologists, inviting reflection on the field’s direction and what comes next for the community.
items.summary_zh: 一次具有里程碑意义的重聚聚集了行业内的关键科技人士，促使人们思考该领域的未来方向及社区的下一步走向。

items.title_en: BadHost – CVE-2026-48710: Starlette Host-Header Auth Bypass
items.title_zh: BadHost – CVE-2026-48710：Starlette 主机头认证绕过
items.summary_en: A vulnerability in Starlette (CVE-2026-48710) allows an authentication bypass via crafted host headers, impacting apps relying on host header validation. The issue underscores the risk of header-based auth and the need for patching and supplemental mitigations. Upgrade and review deployment configurations to reduce exposure.
items.summary_zh: Starlette 的 CVE-2026-48710 漏洞通过操控的主机头实现认证绕过，影响依赖主机头校验的应用。此问题凸显了基于头信息的认证风险，需要尽快打补丁并加强访问控制。请升级并检查部署配置以降低暴露度。

items.title_en: C64 Basic: Game Map Overhead “Camera View”
items.title_zh: C64 Basic：游戏地图的俯视摄像机视图实现
items.summary_en: The piece demonstrates techniques for implementing an overhead camera view in the C64 BASIC era, including memory layout, scrolling, and tile mapping to render larger maps on limited hardware. It showcases the ingenuity developers used to push retro hardware beyond its limits.
items.summary_zh: 文中展示了在 C64 BASIC 时代实现俯视摄像机视图的技术，包括内存布局、滚动和地图块映射，从而在受限硬件上呈现更大规模的地图，体现了早期开发者如何突破硬件极限的创造力。

items.title_en: Raft Consensus with a Minority of Nodes
items.title_zh: 少数节点下的 Raft 共识
items.summary_en: Explores how Raft behaves when only a minority of nodes are available, highlighting tradeoffs between progress and safety in partitions and resilience. The discussion has practical implications for designing fault-tolerant distributed systems.
items.summary_zh: 分析在只有少数节点可用时 Raft 的表现，指出在分区与弹性场景下进展与安全性之间的权衡，对设计容错分布式系统具有实践意义。

items.title_en: DeepSWE: A contamination-free benchmark for long-horizon coding agents
items.title_zh: DeepSWE：用于长期代码生成任务的无污染基准
items.summary_en: DeepSWE introduces a contamination-free benchmark for long-horizon coding agents, ensuring test data isn’t tainted by training data. This enables fairer evaluation of planning, memory, and multi-step reasoning in code-generation AI.
items.summary_zh: DeepSWE 提供一个无污染的基准，用于评估面向长期代码生成任务的模型，确保评测数据不被训练数据污染。该基准有助于更公平地衡量代码生成AI在规划、记忆和多步推理方面的表现。

items.title_en: What Is a Direct Attach Copper (DAC) Cable
items.title_zh: 直接附加铜缆（DAC）是什么
items.summary_en: DAC cables are short-range, high-speed copper interconnects used for server connections, offering cost and power advantages over fiber for inside-rack links. They bring simplicity and low latency but trade off maximum distance. This staple of data-center design remains relevant as workloads shift toward dense, power-efficient topologies.
items.summary_zh: 直接附加铜缆（DAC）是一种用于服务器的短距离高速铜缆，相较光纤在机架内链路具有成本与功耗优势。它的优点是简单、低延迟，但距离受限。DAC 仍然是数据中心设计中的重要选择，尤其在追求高密度与低功耗的拓扑中。

items.title_en: Phloto for My Photo Flow
items.title_zh: Phloto：我的照片工作流新工具
items.summary_en: Phloto introduces a streamlined workflow for photo processing, aiming to simplify edits, metadata handling, and exports. The tool highlights how thoughtful automation can cut friction in everyday creative work. It reflects the broader trend of integrating AI and automation into digital photography processes.
items.summary_zh: Phloto 引入了一种简化的照片处理工作流，旨在简化编辑、元数据处理和导出等步骤。这体现了对日常创作流程中减少摩擦的用心自动化，并反映了将 AI 与自动化整合到数字摄影流程的趋势。

items.title_en: C array types are weird
items.title_zh: C 语言中的数组类型真的很奇怪
items.summary_en: It reinforces why a solid grasp of the array-pointer boundary is essential for safe, correct C programming.
items.summary_zh: 文章揭示了 C 语言数组类型中的若干微妙怪异之处，包括数组如何衰变为指针、指针运算与下标访问的交互，以及容易踩坑的边界情况。强调理解数组与指针之间的界限对实现安全、正确的 C 编程至关重要。

items.title_en: I built a Git-tracked book production pipeline
items.title_zh: 我构建了一个可 Git 跟踪的书籍生产流水线
items.summary_en: Shows how to replace proprietary tools with a Git-tracked book production pipeline, enabling reproducible builds and collaborative editing. The approach emphasizes transparency, version control, and long-term maintenance of publishing workflows.
items.summary_zh: 展示如何用一个可 Git 跟踪的书籍生产流水线来替代专有工具，实现可重复构建与协同编辑。该方法强调透明性、版本控制以及出版工作流的长期维护。

items.title_en: We are Poles, so, of course, we print in Latin
items.title_zh: 我们是波兰人，所以当然用拉丁字母印刷
items.summary_en: A cultural note on Polish typography and branding choosing Latin script; it discusses how language and script decisions influence design choices. The piece sheds light on localization and script topology in a regional context.
items.summary_zh: 关于波兰人在排版与品牌设计中选择拉丁字母的文化笔记，讨论语言与文字选择如何影响设计决策。该文章从区域视角揭示本地化与字体选择的影响。

items.title_en: Splinter Cell veteran says realistic modern lighting has screwed up stealth game
items.title_zh: 《潜龙谍影》资深玩家：现实照明破坏潜行游戏
items.summary_en: A Splinter Cell veteran argues that modern lighting realism makes it nearly impossible to distinguish light, shadow, and safe paths, breaking classic stealth cues. This critique highlights the tension between photoreal visuals and clear gameplay signals, suggesting designers may need stronger visual rules or scripted stealth to preserve tension.
items.summary_zh: 这名《潜龙谍影》资深玩家认为当代光照的真实感让玩家难以分辨光线、阴影与安全区，削弱了潜行设计的清晰度。此观点凸显了写实光照与游戏性之间的矛盾，可能促使开发者在视觉语言上做出更明确的规则或采用更强的剧情化潜行判定来维持紧张感。

items.title_en: Cate v1.0 is out: The Infinite canvas workspace for developers
items.title_zh: Cate 1.0 发布：面向开发者的无限画布工作区
items.summary_en: Cate 1.0 introduces an infinite canvas workspace tailored for developers to sketch, diagram, and prototype ideas alongside code, with collaborative features and workflow integrations.
items.summary_zh: Cate 1.0 发布，提供面向开发者的无限画布工作区，便于在代码、图示与原型之间自由工作，并具备协作与工作流集成。

items.title_en: The Forgotten Art of the LAN Party (2023)
items.title_zh: 被遗忘的局域网聚会艺术（2023）
items.summary_en: Revisits LAN parties as a social-technical phenomenon: in 2023 they remain valuable for hands-on hardware tinkering, local multiplayer energy, and community building that online-only ecosystems can't replicate. The piece also offers practical tips to revive the scene, from retro rigs to local networks and shared screens.
items.summary_zh: 本文回顾 2023 年的局域网聚会文化，认为线下的设备共享、现场改装和本地多人互动仍然带来独特的技术乐趣与社交氛围，线上生态难以完全替代。文章还给出重振这类聚会的思路，如组织经济友好的装置、优化局域网和共享显示等。

items.title_en: Opaque Types in Python
items.title_zh: Python中的不透明类型
items.summary_en: A dive into opaque types for Python typing, explaining how you can hide internal representations behind a stable API to improve abstraction, maintainability, and type safety.
items.summary_zh: 本文介绍 Python 类型系统中的不透明类型，讲解如何将内部实现隐藏在稳定的 API 之后，以提升抽象性、可维护性和静态类型的安全性。

items.title_en: IBM Confidential: System/360 File Organization [video]
items.title_zh: IBM Confidential：System/360 文件组织（视频）
items.summary_en: A historical video about IBM System/360 file organization, covering record formats, addressing, and data layout decisions that influenced early mainframe software design.
items.summary_zh: 这段关于 System/360 的文件组织的历史视频，介绍了记录格式、寻址方式和当时对数据组织的设计决策。内容帮助理解早期主机软件设计的原则，并影响后续体系结构的演进。

items.title_en: Rosalind: A genomics toolkit in Rust running whole-genome pipelines on a laptop
items.title_zh: Rosalind：用 Rust 编写的基因组学工具包，可在笔记本电脑上运行全基因组管线
items.summary_en: Rosalind is a genomics toolkit written in Rust that runs whole-genome pipelines on a laptop. It demonstrates how Rust's performance and safety can empower researchers to carry out end-to-end analyses locally, reducing reliance on cloud or clusters. This portability could lower barriers for small labs and field work.
items.summary_zh: Rosalind 是用 Rust 编写的基因组学工具包，可以在笔记本电脑上运行完整的全基因组管线。其展示了 Rust 的高性能与内存安全如何让研究者在本地完成一整套分析，减少对云端或计算集群的依赖。这种便携性有望降低小型实验室的门槛并支持现场工作。

items.title_en: Phantasy Star IV – 1993 Developer Interviews
items.title_zh: Phantasy Star IV：1993 年开发者访谈
items.summary_en: A curio for retro fans, these interviews shed light on design constraints and decisions behind PSIV, including party balance, writing, and hardware limits.
items.summary_zh: 这组 1993 年的开发者访谈为怀旧玩家提供珍贵洞见，揭示了《幻影星尘 IV》在人物平衡、剧情撰写与硬件限制等方面的设计取舍。

items.title_en: Matrix Multiplications on GPUs Run Faster When Given "Predictable" Data (2024)
items.title_zh: GPU 的矩阵乘法在数据可预测时跑得更快（2024）
items.summary_en: New findings show GPUs speed up matrix multiplication when input data patterns are predictable, reducing memory latency. This has practical implications for ML workloads, benchmarking, and compiler optimizations. It suggests data layout and pre-processing can meaningfully influence performance.
items.summary_zh: 研究表明，当输入数据模式可预测时，GPU 的矩阵乘法速度更快，降低了内存延迟。这对机器学习负载、基准测试和编译器优化有实际影响，暗示数据布局和预处理可以显著影响性能。

items.title_en: How do you build a semiconductor company on something that's free?
items.title_zh: 如何以免费资源打造半导体公司？
items.summary_en: An exploration of open-source silicon business models, showing how startups can monetize through services, IP, and foundry partnerships while embracing freely available designs.
items.summary_zh: 文章探讨开源 silicon 的商业模式，展示初创公司如何通过服务、知识产权和代工伙伴关系实现盈利，同时拥抱自由获取的设计。

items.title_en: The Steinwinter Supercargo
items.title_zh: 斯坦温特超货车
items.summary_en: Steinwinter’s Supercargo is a forgotten road vehicle that stands apart from today’s mainstream designs. The piece uses it to illustrate how unusual engineering choices can leave a lasting, if niche, imprint on automotive history.
items.summary_zh: 斯坦温特超货车是如今已被遗忘的道路车辆，与当代主流设计截然不同。本文借它揭示了非常规工程决策如何在汽车史中留下独特而深刻的印记。

items.title_en: What I've Learned (So Far) Building Online Mini Games with Elixir and Swift
items.title_zh: 我在用 Elixir 与 Swift 构建在线小游戏时学到的经验
items.summary_en: Shares practical lessons from building online mini games with Elixir on the back end and Swift on the client, covering concurrency, real-time features, and networking concerns. The author emphasizes architecture choices that balance responsiveness with maintainability.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享用 Elixir 构建在线小游戏后学到的经验，涵盖并发、实时特性与客户端-服务器架构的取舍。文章强调在可维护性与响应性之间取得平衡的重要性，以及在分层设计中的实际教训。

items.title_en: What Gets Kept
items.title_zh: 被珍藏的是什么
items.summary_en: Examines how archivists decide what to keep, using Kerouac as a touchstone to discuss the tension between spontaneity and preservation. The piece considers how digital archiving will shape what about authors and their work survives for future readers.
items.summary_zh: 讨论档案学在选择保留什么时的权衡，以凯鲁亚克为例探讨自发性与保存之间的张力。文章还思考数字化存档将如何影响未来读者对作者及其作品的留存与理解。

items.title_en: Theseus: Translating Win32 to WASM
items.title_zh: Theseus：将 Win32 转译为 WASM
items.summary_en: Theseus aims to translate Win32 binaries into WebAssembly, enabling legacy Windows applications to run in the browser or on non-Windows runtimes. The approach showcases WASM as a portability layer with potential for reducing platform lock-in, though real-world viability remains to be seen. It highlights ongoing efforts to bridge desktop software to the web.
items.summary_zh: Theseus 旨在将 Win32 二进制转换为 WebAssembly，使传统 Windows 应用能够在浏览器或非 Windows 的运行时中运行。该思路展示了 WASM 作为跨平台层的潜力，可能降低对特定平台的依赖，但实际落地的可行性仍待观察，反映出将桌面软件桥接到网页的持续努力。

items.title_en: My new obsession: A horse-racing board game of pure luck
items.title_zh: 我的新痴迷：一款纯靠运气的赛马棋盘游戏
items.summary_en: A new obsession is a horse-racing board game driven entirely by luck, emphasizing social play and tactile components over strategy. It reflects a trend toward lighter, social games that reward quick interaction and shared moments. The game spotlights how accessibility and social dynamics can drive popularity.
items.summary_zh: 我的新痴迷是一款完全靠运气的赛马棋盘游戏，强调社交互动和触感体验，而非复杂策略。这体现了偏向轻量、社交型桌游的趋势，强调快速互动与共享时刻的魅力。

items.title_en: Are we self-sovereign PKI yet?
items.title_zh: 我们真的实现了自我主权的 PKI 吗？
items.summary_en: The post surveys progress toward self-sovereign PKI, evaluating how decentralized identifiers, verifiable credentials, and privacy-preserving protocols are shaping trust on the web.
items.summary_zh: 文章评估实现自我主权 PKI 的进展，探讨去中心化标识（DID）、可验证凭证等技术，以及隐私保护协议如何塑造网络上的信任基础。

items.title_en: The Structural Barriers to AI Lawyers
items.title_zh: AI 律师的结构性障碍
items.summary_en: Identifies non-technical barriers to deploying AI in the legal field—regulatory, procedural, and professional norms—and calls for policy and process reforms to unlock AI's potential.
items.summary_zh: 指出在法律领域部署 AI 面临的结构性障碍（监管、流程与专业规范等非技术因素），并提出改革路径以释放 AI 的潜力。

items.title_en: Liverpool and Manchester Railway
items.title_zh: 利物浦与曼彻斯特铁路
items.summary_en: An overview of the Liverpool and Manchester Railway, the first paid-passenger railway to rely on steam power, and its enduring impact on transport, industry, and standardization of rail gauges.
items.summary_zh: 利物浦—曼彻斯特铁路是世界上第一条以蒸汽动力运转的客运铁路，深刻影响了交通、工业与铁路标准化的进程。

items.title_en: A history of obituaries in American newspapers
items.title_zh: 美国报纸中的讣告史
items.summary_en: Charts how obituaries have evolved in American newspapers, reflecting social norms, race, gender, and editorial practice, while digital archives reshape discovery and research around obituaries.
items.summary_zh: 梳理美国报纸中讣告的历史演变，揭示社会规范、种族、性别与编辑实践对讣告文本的影响，以及数字档案如何改变讣告的发现与研究方式。

items.title_en: A Comma and a Question Mark, Redux: Quick Terminal Helpers Using Pi
items.title_zh: 逗号与问号，Redux：使用 Pi 的快速终端助手
items.summary_en: A playful article presents small terminal utilities built around Pi and punctuation to speed up shell work. It shows how tiny, well-designed tools can boost daily productivity and encourage developers to rethink command-line ergonomics. The takeaway is the value of small, composable tools.
items.summary_zh: 一篇富有趣味的文章展示了基于 Pi 与标点符号的简小终端工具，用于加速日常命令行工作。它说明了微小且设计良好的工具如何提升日常生产力，并促使开发者重新思考命令行的符合性与可组合性。

items.title_en: Seeking a Language in Mathematics 1523-1571
items.title_zh: 数学中的语言之寻：1523–1571
items.summary_en: Surveys early modern efforts to codify a symbolic mathematical language between 1523 and 1571, tracing how notation evolved to support abstract reasoning and pave the way for modern algebra.
items.summary_zh: 回顾在 1523–1571 年间，早期现代数学如何通过符号化语言的形成来推动抽象推理，为现代代数学铺路。
